channel.title: Arcane City Events - Next 14 Days
channel.description: Upcoming Arcane City events from 2026-05-25 through the next 14 days.

item.title: [05/26] Cryptopsy, Necrot, Fulci, Blood Monolith @ Preserving Underground
item.description:
Decibel Magazine Tour with Cryptopsy, Necrot, and more at Preserving Underground

Venue: Preserving Underground

View event on Arcane City

item.title: [05/26] Bad Movie Bingo: Terror Vision @ Bottlerocket Social Hall
item.description:
Monthly Bad Movie Bingo night featuring the 1986 sci-fi horror comedy TerrorVision, in partnership with Neo-Trash Video.

Venue: Bottlerocket Social Hall

View event on Arcane City

item.title: [05/26] Godzilla Nether Portal + Scrumper + Bastard Accident + I Am the Lizard Queen @ Rock Room
item.description:
A night of wild experimental Punk with Chicago's Godzilla Nether Portal and Scrumper with local bands Bastard Accident and I Am the Lizard Queen

Venue: Rock Room

View event on Arcane City

item.title: [05/26] Snowmen @ Brillobox
item.description:
Snowmen live at Brillobox.

Venue: Brillobox

View event on Arcane City

item.title: [05/27] Rock N Roll Rendezvous @ Rock Room
item.description:
A high-energy rock night at Rockroom featuring Black Mambas, Mala Vista, Grinhound, and United Stare.

Venue: Rock Room

View event on Arcane City

item.title: [05/27] The Corduroys & The Eds @ The Government Center
item.description:
The Corduroys and The Eds perform live at Government Center on May 27th.

Venue: The Government Center

View event on Arcane City

item.title: [05/27] Alga @ Spirit
item.description:
ALGA (members of Sharp Pins) w/ support from The Garment District + Prepare Thyself

Venue: Spirit

View event on Arcane City

item.title: [05/28] Whistleblowers
item.description:
A new play about teaching empathy to missile manufacturers, written and directed by Spencer Byham-Carson.

View event on Arcane City

item.title: [05/28] The Big Country @ Spirit
item.description:
Horace Whisper &amp;amp;amp;amp;amp;amp;amp;amp;amp;amp;amp;amp;amp;amp;amp;amp;amp;amp; The Empty Hand present The Big Country at Spirit Lodge with special guests Clear Creek SP and Jewels &amp;amp;amp;amp;amp;amp;amp;amp;amp;amp;amp;amp;amp;amp;amp;amp;amp;amp; More.

Venue: Spirit

View event on Arcane City

item.title: [05/28] Lespecial: We Are Experiencing Tentacle Difficulties @ Thunderbird
item.description:
Lespecial brings their 'We Are Experiencing Tentacle Difficulties' tour to Thunderbird in Pittsburgh, PA on May 28.

Venue: Thunderbird

View event on Arcane City

item.title: [05/28] Non-Stop Erotic Cabaret @ Poetry Lounge
item.description:
A post punk, new wave, 80s goth &amp;amp;amp;amp;amp;amp;amp;amp;amp;amp; synth sleaze DJ night at Poetry in Pittsburgh.

Venue: Poetry Lounge

View event on Arcane City

item.title: [05/29] A Night of Durational Music w/ Forrest Management @ Wood Street Galleries
item.description:
A night of durational music featuring Forest Management (Chicago) and local Pittsburgh artists at Wood Street Galleries.

Venue: Wood Street Galleries

View event on Arcane City

item.title: [05/29] PANELS: Encore Closing @ 804 Penn Ave
item.description:
PANELS returns for a special closing reception on Friday, May 29 from 6pm–9pm as part of the Pittsburgh Gallery Crawl in Downtown Pittsburgh.

Venue: 804 Penn Ave

View event on Arcane City

item.description:
hardcore show at ormsby

item.description:

item.description:

item.title: [05/29] Total Con with Speed Plans, Snarling Dogs, The Kron @ The Courts
item.description:
Leeds UK anarcho-punk band Total Con headlines a punk show at the Courts with local Pittsburgh acts Speed Plans, Snarling Dogs, and The Kron.

Venue: The Courts

item.title: [05/29] Stupidhead / Blinder / James Castle @ Sheen&amp;amp;amp;amp;amp;amp;amp;amp;amp;amp;amp;amp;amp;amp;amp;amp;amp;apos;s Place

item.title: [05/30] C.Scott – Phase 2 Album Release Party @ Trace Brewing
item.description:

item.title: [05/30] Darkroom @ Side Quest

item.description:
